Keycloak
(OIDC Provider)

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Redis Session
(セッションストア)

g.text:
① GET /auth/login
ログイン開始リクエスト

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 223px; height: 1px; padding-top: 260px; margin-left: 487px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② PKCE 生成
code_verifier (ランダム) →
code_challenge = SHA256(verifier)
state パラメータ生成 (CSRF防御)

g.text:
③ 302 Redirect → Keycloak /authorize
+ Set-Cookie: k1s0_oauth_state, k1s0_pkce_verifier (HttpOnly, 5min TTL)

④ 認可リクエスト
response_type=code & code_challenge & code_challenge_method=S256 & state & scope=openid

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 173px; height: 1px; padding-top: 378px; margin-left: 1067px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑤ ユーザーがログイン画面で
認証情報を入力

g.text:
⑥ 302 Redirect → /auth/callback?code=AUTH_CODE&state=STATE
認可コードとstate付きでコールバック

⑦ GET /auth/callback?code=X&state=Y
+ Cookie: k1s0_oauth_state, k1s0_pkce_verifier

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 213px; height: 1px; padding-top: 478px; margin-left: 487px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑧ state パラメータ検証
Cookie state == Query state
不一致 → BFF_AUTH_STATE_MISMATCH

g.text:
⑨ POST /token (grant_type=authorization_code)
code=AUTH_CODE & code_verifier=VERIFIER & redirect_uri

⑩ access_token + refresh_token + id_token (JWT RS256)
Claims: sub, realm_access, resource_access, tier_access

⑪ セッション作成 (SessionData)
AccessToken, RefreshToken, IDToken,
ExpiresAt, CSRFToken, Subject を保存

⑫ Set-Cookie: k1s0_session (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax)
+ JSON: {status: "authenticated", csrf_token: "..."}
OAuth flow Cookie削除 (state, verifier)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 170px; margin-left: 1807px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
トークンはサーバーサイド保持
ブラウザにはセッションIDのみ
(BFF Pattern: Token Handler)

BFF Proxy
(Cookie→Bearer変換)

バックエンドサービス
(Rust / Go)

g.text:
① HTTPS リクエスト
Cookie: k1s0_session + X-CSRF-Token ヘッダー

② HTTP 転送 (TLS 終端済み)
SSL/TLS オフロード完了

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 203px; height: 1px; padding-top: 885px; margin-left: 607px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ Kong JWT プラグイン
RS256 署名検証 (JWKS エンドポイント)
iss / aud / exp クレーム検証
レートリミットチェック

g.text:
④ レートリミットチェック通過
リクエスト転送

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 213px; height: 1px; padding-top: 980px; margin-left: 887px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑤ Istio サイドカー処理
mTLS 暗号化 (Pod間通信)
AuthorizationPolicy: tier_access クレーム検証
サービス間通信の認証

g.text:
⑥ BFF Proxy: Cookie → Bearer 変換
Redis からセッション取得 → access_token 抽出

セッション取得
GET session:{id}

⑦ Authorization: Bearer {access_token}
バックエンドサービスへ転送

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 193px; height: 1px; padding-top: 765px; margin-left: 1857px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
通信暗号化レイヤー
外部: HTTPS (Nginx TLS終端)
Gateway内部: HTTP
Pod間: Istio mTLS (自動)

g.text: SECTION 3: RBAC 権限解決フロー

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1192px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
access_token から以下を取得:
- sub (ユーザーID)
- realm_access.roles (レルムロール)
- resource_access.{client}.roles (リソースロール)
- tier_access (Tierアクセス権)
- preferred_username
- email

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1192px; margin-left: 392px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
HasRole(claims, role)
→ realm_access.roles にロールが含まれるか
HasResourceRole(claims, resource, role)
→ resource_access[resource].roles にロールが含まれるか
HasTierAccess(claims, tier)
→ tier_access に指定Tierが含まれるか

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 308px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1192px; margin-left: 752px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
CheckPermission(claims, resource, action)
1. sys_admin ロール → 全権限 (bypass)
2. admin ロール → 全権限 (bypass)
3. resource_access[resource] に action or admin →許可
4. 上記以外 → 拒否 (deny by default)
ホワイトリストモデル: 明示的許可のみ

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1265px; margin-left: 1121px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 権限あり？

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1215px; margin-left: 1301px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
200 OK
リクエスト処理続行

g.text: はい

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 268px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1310px; margin-left: 1301px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
403 Forbidden
SYS_AUTH_FORBIDDEN
「この操作を実行する権限がありません」

g.text: いいえ

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1383px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.b: ⑥ システムロール定義

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1412px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
全権限 (スーパーユーザー)
全リソース × 全アクション
CheckPermission で即時 true

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1412px; margin-left: 342px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
読み書き権限 (運用者)
モニタリング・設定変更
リソース別にアクション制限

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1412px; margin-left: 612px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
読み取り専用 (監査者)
全リソース参照可能
変更操作は不可

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1383px; margin-left: 961px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.b: Gin ミドルウェアチェーン

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1423px; margin-left: 911px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
AuthMiddleware
Bearer トークン検証 + Claims 抽出

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1423px; margin-left: 1131px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
RequireRole / RequirePermission
ロール or リソース権限チェック

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1423px; margin-left: 1371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
RequireTierAccess
Tier アクセス権チェック

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 303px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1210px; margin-left: 1607px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.b: ④ Deny by Default (ホワイトリストモデル)
div.font:
明示的に許可されていないアクションは全て拒否
CheckPermission が false → 403 Forbidden

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 303px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1290px; margin-left: 1607px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.b: ⑤ sys_admin = スーパーユーザー
div.font:
CheckPermission の最初のチェックで即時 true を返す
全ての権限チェックをバイパス

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1402px; margin-left: 1612px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.b: 認証エラーレスポンス
div.font:
401: SYS_AUTH_UNAUTHENTICATED (トークン無し)
401: SYS_AUTH_INVALID_TOKEN (トークン無効)
403: SYS_AUTH_FORBIDDEN (権限不足)
403: SYS_AUTH_TIER_FORBIDDEN (Tier権限不足)

g.text: SECTION 4: JWT JWKS 鍵ローテーション + CLI Device Code Grant

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 548px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1640px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
JWT JWKS 鍵ローテーション
RS256 / 2048-bit RSA / Cache TTL 10分 / ローテーション 90日

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1682px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
署名鍵: Key A
JWKS エンドポイント: [Key A]
全トークンは Key A で署名

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1782px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
新署名鍵: Key B を生成
JWKS エンドポイント: [Key A, Key B]
新トークンは Key B で署名開始

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1882px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
新トークン: Key B で署名
既存トークン: Key A でも検証可能
JWKS: [Key A, Key B] (両方公開)
ダウンタイムゼロのローテーション

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1992px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Key A を JWKS から削除
JWKS エンドポイント: [Key B]
Key A 署名のトークンは検証不可

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 273px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1715px; margin-left: 357px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
JWKSVerifier: cacheTTL (デフォルト10分)
ダブルチェックロック (sync.RWMutex)
フェッチ失敗時は既存キャッシュにフォールバック
InvalidateCache() で手動無効化可能

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 273px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1825px; margin-left: 357px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.b: トークン検証パラメータ
div.font:
アルゴリズム: RS256 (RSA-SHA256)
鍵長: 2048-bit RSA
検証項目: iss (発行者), aud (対象者), exp (有効期限)
ライブラリ: lestrrat-go/jwx/v2

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1640px; margin-left: 761px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
CLI Device Code Grant (RFC 8628)
client_id = k1s0-cli / urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1695px; margin-left: 781px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
k1s0 CLI
(Rust CLI ツール)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1695px; margin-left: 1281px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Keycloak
(OIDC Provider)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1695px; margin-left: 1781px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ユーザー
(ブラウザで認証)

g.text:
① POST /device (client_id=k1s0-cli, scope=openid)
デバイス認可リクエスト送信

② device_code + user_code + verification_uri + expires_in + interval
デバイスコード情報を返却

③ user_code と verification_uri をターミナルに表示
「ブラウザで以下のURLを開き、コードを入力してください」

④ ブラウザで verification_uri を開く
user_code 入力 → ログイン認証

⑤ POST /token (grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code)
device_code でポーリング (interval秒間隔, slow_down時+5秒)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 203px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1955px; margin-left: 967px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ポーリング中の応答:
authorization_pending → 待機して再試行
slow_down → interval + 5秒
expired_token → タイムアウト
access_denied → ユーザー拒否

g.text:
⑥ access_token + refresh_token (認証完了)
CLI がトークンをローカルに保存
